name: Jhon Keneth Ryan Namias
title: Full Stack Engineer & AI Automation Specialist
summary:
Full Stack Engineer and AI Automation Specialist dedicated to building intelligent systems that drive efficiency. I specialize in bridging the gap between robust software architecture and the next generation of AI-driven workflows.

My expertise is rooted in full-stack development, prompt engineering, and end-to-end automation. Currently, I serve as the Project Manager at MASH and the Head of the Technical Committee at the University of Caloocan City, where I lead technical strategy and cross-functional teams. My experience ranges from engineering automation tools for global firms like Wilshire Financial Network to building scalable backend systems. I am particularly passionate about the intersection of AI and productivity, having developed custom solutions using Eleven Labs and LLM integration to transform manual operations into streamlined, automated processes.

Beyond development, I am deeply involved in the cybersecurity community. As a competitor in HackForGov 2025, I focus on sharpening my skills in web exploitation and digital forensics to ensure that the automation I build remains secure and resilient. I hold verified certifications from HackerRank in Software Engineering and React.js, reflecting my commitment to clean, production-quality code.

I thrive on the philosophy of "Learning by Doing" and am always eager to contribute to the Philippine tech ecosystem through mentorship and technical leadership. Whether it's architecting a new application or integrating AI into a business workflow, I'm driven by the challenge of creating high-impact digital solutions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
